description_long: This is a vintage rectangular cardboard box labeled 'PEPTICOL', featuring ornate, dark green and gold graphics with detailed text and illustrations. The front and back panels display a decorative arch with grapevine imagery and a circular illustration of a cow and a person, suggesting the product's ingredients or intended use. The box is covered in Polish text, including usage instructions and product details, with the brand and product name prominently displayed. The side panels repeat the product name in bold, stylized font within a bordered frame. The top of the box is also labeled, and the overall design is consistent with early to mid-20th-century pharmaceutical or personal care packaging. The box appears to be sealed, with no visible dispenser or opening mechanism.
description: A vintage rectangular cardboard box labeled 'PEPTICOL', decorated with ornate green and gold graphics, grapevine imagery, and detailed Polish text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with grapevine and circular illustrations, ornate borders, and detailed product information.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the product name 'PEPTICOL' in bold, bordered text with minimal additional graphics.
description_view_2: Back view similar to the front, with grapevine imagery and detailed text, but slightly different layout and less prominent illustrations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the product name 'PEPTICOL' in a bordered frame, mirroring the other side.
